subcodes.first_line: I walk now, and all creation walketh behind Me, yet the people remain veiled by a mighty veil. We make mention, and all things make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نمشی الحین و تمشی الوری عن ورآئی ولکن الناس فی حجاب عظیم نذکر و تذکر الاشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @courtesy; culture [adab], @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
